     639            8 :     } // setupUi
     640              : 
     641            8 :     void retranslateUi(QMainWindow *SudokuSolver)
     642              :     {
     643            8 :         SudokuSolver->setWindowTitle(QCoreApplication::translate("SudokuSolver", "SudokuSolver", nullptr));
     644            8 :         button->setText(QCoreApplication::translate("SudokuSolver", "Submit", nullptr));
     645            8 :         plainTextEdit->setPlainText(QCoreApplication::translate("SudokuSolver", "Input numbers (1-9) for cells with fixed value and any other character to denote a blank cell.", nullptr));
     646            8 :     } // retranslateUi
